chapter: JEFP109 – The Book That Saved the Earth
title: The Book That Saved the Earth – Easy SAQ

questions.question: Who is the author of the play 'The Book That Saved the Earth'?
questions.answer: The author of the play is Claire Boiko.

questions.question: In which century is the play set?
questions.answer: The play is set in the twenty-fifth century.

questions.question: Who introduces the story in the play?
questions.answer: The Historian introduces the story in the play.

questions.question: Why is the twentieth century called the ‘Era of the Book’?
questions.answer: Because books were the main source of knowledge and learning during that time.

questions.question: Who is the ruler of Mars?
questions.answer: Think-Tank is the ruler of Mars.

questions.question: Who is Think-Tank’s apprentice?
questions.answer: Noodle is Think-Tank’s apprentice.

questions.question: Where do the Martians land on Earth?
questions.answer: The Martians land in a public library on Earth.

questions.question: What do the Martians mistake books for?
questions.answer: The Martians mistake books for sandwiches.

questions.question: Who leads the Martian mission on Earth?
questions.answer: Captain Omega leads the Martian mission on Earth.

questions.question: Name the book that confuses the Martians the most.
questions.answer: The book Mother Goose confuses the Martians the most.

questions.question: Why do the Martians think books are meant for communication?
questions.answer: They believe books are communication devices because they do not understand reading.

questions.question: Why do nursery rhymes confuse the Martians?
questions.answer: The Martians take the figurative language in nursery rhymes literally.

questions.question: What does Think-Tank believe Earthlings can grow?
questions.answer: Think-Tank believes Earthlings can grow metals like silver.

questions.question: Why does Think-Tank panic after reading the Humpty Dumpty rhyme?
questions.answer: He believes the rhyme predicts his downfall.

questions.question: What decision does Think-Tank take regarding Earth?
questions.answer: Think-Tank decides to cancel the invasion of Earth.

questions.question: Where do the Martians flee after cancelling the invasion?
questions.answer: They flee towards Alpha Centauri.

questions.question: Who later becomes the leader of Mars?
questions.answer: Noodle later becomes the leader of Mars.

questions.question: What do Earthlings teach the Martians later?
questions.answer: Earthlings teach the Martians how to read.

questions.question: Which book do Martians still fear?
questions.answer: The Martians still fear the book Mother Goose.

questions.question: What genre does the play belong to?
questions.answer: The play belongs to the science fiction comedy genre.

questions.question: What ultimately saves the Earth from invasion?
questions.answer: Books and knowledge save the Earth from invasion.

questions.question: What quality of Think-Tank leads to his failure?
questions.answer: His arrogance leads to his failure.

questions.question: What literary device creates humour in the play?
questions.answer: Irony creates humour in the play.

questions.question: What does the library symbolise in the play?
questions.answer: The library symbolises knowledge.

questions.question: State one message conveyed by the play.
questions.answer: The play conveys that knowledge is more powerful than weapons.
